channel.title: Data Mesh on Alexey Evlampiev
channel.description: Recent content in Data Mesh on Alexey Evlampiev

item.title: Freshness Isn't the Only Axis: APIs, Projections, and Federated Queries
item.description: Freshness is one requirement. Evaluate calls, projections, and federated queries across eight dimensions, including coherence, semantics, authority, and recovery.

item.title: Your Operational Data Is Someone Else's Reference Data
item.description: Data is operational to its owner and reference to everyone else. Governed consumer-oriented projections let services answer new cross-domain questions without synchronous API choreography.
